Our story

Privilege doesn't give
you your voice.
You have to find it.

"I grew up with every advantage and still spent two decades figuring out who I actually was. That journey is exactly why Anaya exists."

I'm Akrati, Indian, born and raised in Abu Dhabi, Marwadi roots. My upbringing was one of affluence and privilege. I had access to the best schools, the best opportunities, a life most people only dream of. By every external measure, I had everything.

And yet. My 20s and 30s were spent doing the hardest work I've ever done: finding my own voice. Therapy. Travel that cracked open my assumptions. Hitting walls I didn't expect to hit. Slowly unlearning the scripts I had absorbed without ever choosing them.

If I — with all my privilege — had to fight that hard to find myself, what does it mean for girls who have none of it? Girls who grow up with far less freedom, far less safety, far less space to even ask the question: what do I want?

That question became impossible to ignore. In 2025, something clicked. I stopped waiting for the perfect moment and started building. Anaya was born, named from three languages, each one pointing at the same truth: care, compassion, and the belief that something greater is possible.

We start in India. We will go wherever the need is greatest. And we will walk with girls until they can stand, fully and freely, in the life they choose for themselves.

— Akrati Johari, with love and intention

"We're not just writing a better future for these girls — we're giving them the pen."

Anaya Offering  ·  Rooted in care. Focused on change.

Our framework

Three pillars. One pathway.

Real, lasting change happens in layers. Our model meets girls where they are and walks with them all the way to who they're meant to become.

01
Foundation

Safety and Basic Needs

Before a girl can dream, she needs to feel safe. We ensure access to food, clothing, and psychological support a stable foundation she can stand on.

02
Education

Learning and Belonging

Through scholarships and school partnerships, we build pathways to education that also become places of community where girls feel truly seen for the first time.

03
Self-actualization

Confidence and Well-being

Through physical and mental well-being programs, we help girls build unshakeable confidence the kind that lets them dream boldly and live life fully on their own terms.

Where we work

Starting in India.
Growing where the need is greatest.

Anaya begins its work in India, a country of extraordinary women and extraordinary inequality. We're building from the ground up, community by community, girl by girl.


As we grow, we will follow the need. Wherever girls and women are living scripts they didn't write, Anaya will be there.

Contact

Get in touch

Whether you want to support our work, partner with us, or simply learn more, we would love to hear from you.

info@anayaoffering

her a future she chooses

Every contribution to Anaya is a declaration that every girl deserves to author her own story. Join us in building a world where that's possible.
